case_title: STATE LABOR COMMISSIONER CHIEF, DIVISION OF LABOR VS. THEODOROS KOLIATSIS

docket_entries.description: ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF STATE LABOR COMMISSIONER CHIEF, DIVISION OF LABOR STANDARDS ENFORCEMENT STATE OF CALIFORNIA

REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF STATE LABOR COMMISSIONER CHIEF, DIVISION OF LABOR STANDARDS ENFORCEMENT STATE OF CALIFORNIA AS TO DEFENDANT KOLIATSIS, THEODOROS AN INDIVIDUAL, DBA 4TH & GEARY FARMERS MARKET JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF STATE LABOR COMMISSIONER CHIEF, DIVISION OF LABOR STANDARDS ENFORCEMENT STATE OF CALIFORNIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KOLIATSIS, THEODOROS AN INDIVIDUAL, DBA 4TH & GEARY FARMERS MARKET $33,771.25 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $33,771.25, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
